scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.setup:dev: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install && cd .. && npm run db:setup:dev
scripts.setup:prod: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install && cd .. && npm run build && npm run db:setup:prod
scripts.db:migrate:dev: cd server && NODE_ENV=development npx knex migrate:latest
scripts.db:migrate:prod: cd server && NODE_ENV=production npx knex migrate:latest
scripts.db:seed:dev: cd server && NODE_ENV=development npx knex seed:run
scripts.db:seed:prod: cd server && NODE_ENV=production npx knex seed:run
scripts.db:setup:dev: npm run db:migrate:dev && npm run db:seed:dev
scripts.db:setup:prod: npm run db:migrate:prod && npm run db:seed:prod
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:client
scripts.demo: cd e2e && npx playwright test --config=playwright.demo.config.ts && npx tsx scripts/compose-video.ts
